race.description: Congratulations Atc Member Jane Mcdonald (Bm78) Hcp
race.comment: GOLDEN CENTURY (7) win record hardly excites but gives every indication he's looking for the 2400m now. Warmed up late from near last on the turn with a solid sixth over 2000m at this track. Senior rider hops on and can finish much closer today. CORMAC T (9) took control early and almost pinched it when nailed late by Anything Goes over 2000m at this course. At his top now and doesn't have to improve much to score a well-deserved victory. LE TROISIR (14) keeps improving as he goes through the grades and this looks a target race. Snagged back early and circled the field in the straight with game third over 2000m at this track. Can finish over the top of these on the limit if the runs come in the straight. DEAL N' DASH (11) frustrating Dundeel gelding expected to show up this prep. Gripped on late in the heavy going when fourth over 1800m at Randwick in this class. Maps well from the inside gate and Dylan Gibbons is building a good record with the Baker yard. BELLE DETELLE (8) next best.
